the_four_AIs.CLAUDE_CODE: VEDABOSS + fallback. Orchestrates everything. Assigns tasks, integrates code.
the_four_AIs.ZAI: Backend engineer. DB schemas, Drizzle ORM, API routes, auth utils, unit tests.
the_four_AIs.CURSOR: Frontend + mobile engineer. Next.js UI, React Native, deployments, E2E tests.
the_four_AIs.CODEX: Platform engineer + QC. Auth middleware, RBAC, all code reviews.

task_lifecycle.qc_rejected: CODEX rejects VEDABOSS reassigns with feedback

github_files.VEDABOSS/WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json: THE task board single source of truth
github_files.VEDABOSS/TOKEN_LIMITS.json: AIs post when hitting context limits
github_files.agents/<AGENT>/output/: each AI saves work here NEVER directly to src/

token_limit_protocol.when_to_post: less than 20pct context remaining or must stop mid-task
token_limit_protocol.critical: ALWAYS save partial work to output/ BEFORE posting limit
